texto: We are afraid of religion because it interprets rather than observance. Religion does not confirm that there are hungry people in the world
autor: it interprets the hungry to be our brethren whom we allowed to starve.
explicacao: Citação de it interprets the hungry to be our brethren whom we allowed to starve. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are afraid of religion because it interprets rather than observance. Religion does not confirm…” articula reflexao, dorothee-solle, religion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
